title: Drive current elevation and web tension instability due to roller contamination
title_zh: 辊面污染导致驱动电流升高与张力失稳
station: drive system and web tension control
operator_note: Drive current began rising steadily around 09:04. Web tension became unstable shortly after. Visual inspection of roller surfaces suggested coating material buildup. Thickness started drifting at 09:18.

expected_outputs.primary_root_cause: roller surface contamination increasing mechanical resistance and drive current
expected_outputs.secondary_root_cause: web tension instability caused by uneven roller grip
expected_outputs.business_risk: coating thickness non-uniformity and potential material waste
